notableEvents.label: Rodolfo Durán GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rodolfo Durán grounds into a double play, shortstop Jorge Mateo to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Will Wagner out at 2nd. Rodolfo Durán out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rodolfo Durán rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rodolfo Durán grounds into a double play, shortstop Jorge Mateo to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Will Wagner out at 2nd. Rodolfo Durán out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies grounds out to first baseman Ty France. Throwing error by first baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar strikes out on a foul tip.
